personal.name: Mohammed Sheik Adhnan
personal.title: Full-Stack Developer
personal.subtitle: Backend & DevOps Focused
personal.bio: Detail-oriented Full-Stack Developer with a strong focus on backend engineering and DevOps. Experienced in designing scalable backend systems, containerized deployments, and secure infrastructure with Docker and NGINX. Known for fast learning, adaptability, and building projects that improve operational efficiency and reduce manual workload.
